heading: Compensation and expenses
label: 6923 Compensation and expenses
text: Members of the National Visitor Facilities Advisory Commission who are not officers or employees of the Federal Government or the government of the District of Columbia are entitled to receive compensation under and expenses under .section 3109 of title 5section 5703 of title 5

L. 90–264, title II, § 202(b)82 Stat. 45Mar. 12, 1968The words “expenses under ” are substituted for “travel expenses including per diem in lieu of subsistence as authorized by for persons in the government service employed intermittently” to eliminate unnecessary words.section 5703 of title 5section 5703 of title 5
